message:
chore: cleanup inheritance code — type alias, remove dead return, fix test PK

- Add ParentFieldsFn type alias for joined inheritance function pointer
  to improve readability in select.rs
- Remove unnecessary trailing return in validation error path
- Rename Student test model PK from student_id to id to match
  parent's PK for correct joined inheritance join

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -415,7 +415,7 @@ mod inheritance_tests {
         #[sqlmodel(parent)]
         person: Person,
         #[sqlmodel(primary_key)]
-        student_id: i64,
+        id: i64,
         grade: String,
     }
